mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messenger (sender_id, receiver_id, content, send_time, read_status) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT m.messenger_id, m.content, m.send_time, m.read_status, s.emp_id AS sender_id, s.name AS sender_name, s.email AS sender_email, s.phone AS sender_phone, s.img_url AS sender_img, sd.name AS sender_department, sp.name AS sender_position, r.emp_id AS receiver_id, r.name AS receiver_name, r.email AS receiver_email, r.phone AS receiver_phone, r.img_url AS receiver_img, rd.name AS receiver_department, rp.name AS receiver_position, ma.is_read AS alarm_read FROM messenger m JOIN employee s ON m.sender_id = s.emp_id LEFT JOIN department sd ON s.department_id = sd.department_id LEFT JOIN position sp ON s.position_id = sp.position_id JOIN employee r ON m.receiver_id = r.emp_id LEFT JOIN department rd ON r.department_id = rd.department_id LEFT JOIN position rp ON r.position_id = rp.position_id LEFT JOIN messenger_alarm ma ON ma.messenger_id = m.messenger_id WHERE m.sender_id = CAST(#{senderId} AS UNSIGNED) ORDER BY m.send_time DESC;

SELECT m.messenger_id, m.content, m.send_time, m.read_status, r.emp_id AS receiver_id, r.name AS receiver_name, r.email AS receiver_email, r.phone AS receiver_phone, r.img_url AS receiver_img, rd.name AS receiver_department, rp.name AS receiver_position, s.emp_id AS sender_id, s.name AS sender_name, s.email AS sender_email, s.phone AS sender_phone, s.img_url AS sender_img, sd.name AS sender_department, sp.name AS sender_position, ma.is_read AS alarm_read FROM messenger m JOIN employee r ON m.receiver_id = r.emp_id LEFT JOIN department rd ON r.department_id = rd.department_id LEFT JOIN position rp ON r.position_id = rp.position_id JOIN employee s ON m.sender_id = s.emp_id LEFT JOIN department sd ON s.department_id = sd.department_id LEFT JOIN position sp ON s.position_id = sp.position_id LEFT JOIN messenger_alarm ma ON ma.messenger_id = m.messenger_id WHERE m.receiver_id = CAST(#{receiverId} AS UNSIGNED) ORDER BY m.send_time DESC;

SELECT m.messenger_id, m.content, m.read_status, m.file_attached, m.send_time, s.emp_id AS sender_id, s.name AS sender_name, s.email AS sender_email, s.phone AS sender_phone, s.img_url AS sender_img, d.name AS sender_department, p.name AS sender_position FROM messenger m JOIN employee s ON m.sender_id = s.emp_id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON s.position_id = p.position_id WHERE m.messenger_id = CAST(#{messageId} AS UNSIGNED) AND m.sender_id = CAST(#{senderId} AS UNSIGNED);

SELECT m.messenger_id, m.content, m.read_status, m.file_attached, m.send_time, s.emp_id AS sender_id, s.name AS sender_name, s.email AS sender_email, s.phone AS sender_phone, s.img_url AS sender_img, d.name AS sender_department, p.name AS sender_position FROM messenger m JOIN employee s ON m.sender_id = s.emp_id LEFT JOIN department d ON s.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON s.position_id = p.position_id WHERE m.messenger_id = CAST(#{messageId} AS UNSIGNED) AND m.receiver_id = CAST(#{receiverId} AS UNSIGNED);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM messenger m WHERE m.receiver_id = CAST(#{empId} AS UNSIGNED) AND m.read_status = 0;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.messenger_id) AS room_count FROM messenger m WHERE m.sender_id = CAST(#{empId} AS UNSIGNED) OR m.receiver_id = CAST(#{empId} AS UNSIGNED);
mapper.update: UPDATE messenger SET read_status = 1 WHERE receiver_id = CAST(#{empId} AS UNSIGNED) AND read_status = 0;
mapper.select: SELECT m.messenger_id, m.file_path FROM messenger m WHERE (m.sender_id = #{empId} OR m.receiver_id = #{empId}) AND m.messenger_id = #{msgId};

SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.name AS empName, e.email AS empEmail, e.phone AS empPhone, e.img_url AS empImg, d.name AS department, p.name AS position FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.emp_id = #{receiverId};
